name: SA Workspace
description: Solution Architect workspace with Salesforce tools and daily workflows

prompts.label: Daily Triage
prompts.prompt: Review my calendar for today and identify customer meetings that need preparation or follow-up.

prompts.label: Meeting Prep
prompts.prompt: Help me prepare for my next customer meeting by summarizing account details and recent opportunities.

globalPrompts.label: SFDC Update
globalPrompts.prompt: Check my Salesforce tasks and opportunities that need updates this week.
